title: Catalog valuation
subtitle: What your catalog is worth — and why. Transparent method, numbers included.
subtitleLabel: Each artist's catalog value, and the whole portfolio.

method.title: How we compute it
method.step1: NPS — your net catalog revenue over 12 months: {nps}
method.note: It's an estimate, not a promise: we always show the range, never a single number. Market multiples: 8-14× (indie), 14-18× (5y+ proven catalog), 18-24× (blue-chip).

simulator.title: Multiple simulator
simulator.description: Drag the multiple to see what a buyer would pay depending on their conviction.

scenarios.title: Three scenarios
scenarios.optimisticDesc: High end — bidding war or strategic buyer

growth.title: What about tomorrow?
growth.description: With your projected 12-month revenue growth, your median valuation could reach {future} within a year.
